passives.name: The Path Between
passives.effects:
If you have at least {{as|130 '''bonus''' attack damage}} and {{as|180 ability power}}, enter either the ''Material World'' or the ''Spirit World'', determined randomly, at the start of the combat phase in each round:

• '''Material World''': Increase your {{as|attack damage}} by 25% and gain {{as|{{pp|50 to 150|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}.
• '''Spirit World''': Increase your {{as|ability power}} by 25% and gain {{as|{{pp|30 to 120}} ability haste}}.

effects_structured.raw: If you have at least 130 bonus AD and 180 AP, randomly enter Material World or Spirit World at the start of each combat round.
Material World: Increase total attack damage by 25%.
Material World: Gain 50-150% bonus attack speed.
Spirit World: Increase total ability power by 25%.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: The Path Between randomly selects Material or Spirit World at round start after AD/AP thresholds are met.
Material/Spirit value ranges are level-scaled: attack speed uses 50-150% and ability haste uses 30-120 with explicit level-1-to-18 table values extracted from page tooltip data.

Source reconciliation: League Wiki infobox plus patch-history section indicate 25% AD/AP world modifiers, while older module-derived description lines still show 20%; canonical structured values follow the current-state 25% modifiers.
